name: California Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 small zucchini, cut into 1 x 1/4" sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the unbaked 9-inch pastry shell and refrigerate.
2. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
3. Drain the artichoke hearts, reserving 2 tablespoons of marinade.
4. Cut the artichokes in half.
5. Sauté zucchini and onion in the reserved marinade for 5 minutes until tender.
6. Beat eggs (or egg-substitute) in a medium bowl until foamy.
7. Stir in cream, milk, salt, savory, and pepper.
8. Spoon the sautéed vegetables into the prepared shell.
9. Add the artichokes and sprinkle with cheese.
10. Pour the egg mixture over the filling.
11. Bake at 425°F for 15 minutes.
12. Lower the heat to 350°F and bake for an additional 20 minutes until a knife inserted comes out clean.
13. Allow to cool for 15 minutes before serving.
